name: Reliance on Undefined, Unspecified, or Implementation-Defined Behavior
description: The product uses an API function, data structure, or other entity in a way that relies on properties not guaranteed by the specification, causing potential failures when ported to different platforms or compilers.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM node invokes operation whose behavior varies by platform or is undefined by the language specification. Look for TRANSFORM(undefined_behavior_operation) where STRUCTURAL(code_construct) relies on implementation-specific guarantees without CONTROL(portability_check) or CONTROL(defined_behavior_assertion).
